Kanji-ROM helper functions
Kanji_JIStoKuTen
inline u16 Kanji_JIStoKuTen(
u16 jis
)

Convert a JIS to KuTen code

Parameters
jis
u16

JIS code to convert

Returns

Corresponding KuTen code

Kanji_KuTenToIndex
inline u16 Kanji_KuTenToIndex(
u16 kuten
)

Convert a KuTen code to kanji index

Parameters
kuten
u16

KuTen code to convert

Returns

Corresponding kanji index

Kanji-ROM access for level 1 kanji
Kanji_GetFromIndex
void Kanji_GetFromIndex(
u8* buf,
u16 index
)

Get bitmap of the given kanji from its index in the Kanji-ROM

Parameters
buf
u8*

Pointer to the buffer where the bitmap will be stored (32 bytes)

index
u16

Kanji's index in the Kanji-ROM

Kanji_GetFromKuTen
inline void Kanji_GetFromKuTen(
u8* buf,
u16 kuten
)

Get bitmap of the given kanji from its KuTen code

Parameters
buf
u8*

Pointer to the buffer where the bitmap will be stored (32 bytes)

kuten
u16

Kanji's KuTen code

Kanji_GetFromJIS
inline void Kanji_GetFromJIS(
u8* buf,
u16 jis
)

Get bitmap of the given kanji from its JIS code

Parameters
buf
u8*

Pointer to the buffer where the bitmap will be stored (32 bytes)

JIS
u16

Kanji's JIS code

Kanji_GetFromIndexL1
inline void Kanji_GetFromIndexL1(
u8* buf,
u16 index
)

See Kanji_GetFromIndex

Kanji_GetFromKuTenL1
inline void Kanji_GetFromKuTenL1(
u8* buf,
u16 kuten
)

See Kanji_GetFromKuTen

Kanji_GetFromJISL1
inline void Kanji_GetFromJISL1(
u8* buf,
u16 jis
)

See Kanji_GetFromJIS

Kanji-ROM access for level 2 kanji
Kanji_GetFromIndexL2
void Kanji_GetFromIndexL2(
u8* buf,
u16 index
)

Get bitmap of the given level 2 kanji from its index in the Kanji-ROM

Parameters
buf
u8*

Pointer to the buffer where the bitmap will be stored (32 bytes)

index
u16

The kanji index in KuTen format
